case_title: SF VS. TOOA DUNSON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNSON, TOOA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1816 SUNNYDALE AVE. S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
